column1: You ... have followed the instructions of your coach. Then you would have won the game.
You ... leave your suitcases here. This place is full of thieves.
Не ... take more than two pills at once. It may damage his health.
Staff ... smoke when serving customers. It's a rule.
You ... have cleared up the mess long ago. Why didn't you do that?
She ... have been more attentive to her family. Now she regrets it.
She ... have opened my letter, because it was private.
I ... have called him. That was a mistake.
She ... have fooled these people. That was rude.
